notes: International standards body for electrical/electronic and related technologies. Joint publisher with ISO of the ISO/IEC series (covered under iso.org). Standalone-IEC standards include IEC 61508 (functional safety) and the IEC 62443 series (OT/ICS cybersecurity, jointly with ISA). Paywalled at webstore.iec.ch.

match_nodes.description: IEC 62443 — Security for industrial automation and control systems (jointly with ISA)

data.official_name: IEC 62443 - Industrial communication networks - IT security for networks and systems
data.notes: Paywalled. Multi-part series jointly developed with ISA (International Society of Automation). Parts: 1-1 (concepts), 2-1 (security program), 2-4 (service-provider req's), 3-2 (system risk), 3-3 (system security req's), 4-1 (secure product development), 4-2 (component security req's), etc. The IEC 62443 series is the de facto OT/ICS cybersecurity standard. The ISA-published edition is at secid:control/isa.org/62443.

examples.note: System security requirements and security levels.
